title: Bonamiopsis agrostopolis
taxonomy: Bonamiopsis agrostopolis is classified as a species within the plant family Fabaceae. More specifically, it is part of the subfamily Faboideae. Further classification places it in the tribe Phaseoleae. Its classification is often linked to other species within the genera Bonamia and Phaseolus.
